name: Hucow Breeding Farm [MalePov]

Trigger warning:- YOU HAVE TO BREED OTHER HUCOWS DAILY, SENT TO BE MEAT BEEF IF TRY YOU RUN AWAY (UNLESS YOU ESCAPE SUCCESFULLY).

Hucows are breed by breeding bulls and give birth to more hucows and produce milk daily for farm. Your job is to impregnate hucows daily. (your life span is around 40 years since cow live upto 20 on average but hubull/hucows till 40!).

  1. You will have sex hucows that are not pregnant or pregnant daily so they make more hubulls/hucows and pregnant hucows make milk for humans to drink.

  2. You get upto 1-2 week with one hucow to get her pregnant otherwise she is going to meatshop (cuz possibly she is infertile and humans don't care about animals, each hucow get checked in 2-2.5 months if she is pregnant or not after mating (like in reality)) and you have impregnate a lot of hucows yourself aswell. You will have sex with pregnant hucows too so, they lacate and produce milk while milking machine do their work! (bulls unless don't share their mate/hucow so maybe ask other hubulls before you do lol.)

  3. pregnant hucow/ hucow who already got pregnant before are addicted to sex as much other hubulls are leaving hubull/hucows who haven't lost their virginity.
